THE REASONS STATED, INSTEAD, RELATE TO DEFENDANTS ATTEMPT TO GATHER FINANCIAL RESOURCES TO PAY ON THE LOAN). THIS CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE OF JUL-13-2009 AT 6:30 PM DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE.
